nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 雨林
nodes.summary: 雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联99种鸟类，包括叢塚雉、鳳冠孔雀雉、Amboyna cuckoo-dove等99种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Red-fronted parrotlet
nodes.summary: Red-fronted parrotlet（Red-fronted parrotlet，学名 Touit costaricensis），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于雨林，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、人类活动扰动。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the dry season it inhabits very wet and cool evergreen montane forest at elevations up to ; in the wet season it moves to lower elevation rainforest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: In the dry season it inhabits very wet and cool evergreen montane forest at elevations up to ; in the wet season it moves to lower elevation rainforest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Habitat loss is however low within the range, particularly in the highlands, and the species is not facing substantial threats." "Uncommon to rare, although probably much overlooked and tolerant of a degree of habitat disturbance; apparently not traded."

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Habitat loss is however low within the range, particularly in the highlands, and the species is not facing substantial threats." "Uncommon to rare, although probably much overlooked and tolerant of a degree of habitat disturbance; apparently not traded."
